title: Amazon India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amazon India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
